membership_requests_resolution_check.name: membership_requests_resolution_check
membership_requests_resolution_check.value:
("membership_requests"."status" = 'pending' and "membership_requests"."resolved_at" is null and "membership_requests"."resolved_by_id" is null)
        or ("membership_requests"."status" <> 'pending' and "membership_requests"."resolved_at" is not null)

organizer_tiebreak_group_context_check.name: organizer_tiebreak_group_context_check
organizer_tiebreak_group_context_check.value: ("organizer_tiebreak_decisions"."context" = 'group-standings' AND "organizer_tiebreak_decisions"."group_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("organizer_tiebreak_decisions"."context" <> 'group-standings' AND "organizer_tiebreak_decisions"."group_id" IS NULL)
